meta.contract: Every blank is written as {role:shape}. shape 'np' = noun phrase, 'cl' = full clause (subject + verb). roles: topic, counter, verdict, pro1/pro2/pro3, con1/con2. The engine performs a lookup only — no grammatical guessing. Question files must supply every role in every shape the cards request.
